subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: In the moment of utterance We are silent, and at the time of silence We speak. What a wondrous world hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید در حین نطق صامتیم و در حین صمت ناطق عجب عالمی ظاهر شده و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
